# NativePlanet Prebuilts

This directory documents where ROM prebuilts are expected in the GrapheneOS build tree.

Do not commit actual prebuilts here:

- `bin/vere`
- `bin/nativeplanet-*` binaries
- `apk/NativePlanetLauncher.apk`
- `pill/*.pill`

Record binary provenance and SHA256 in docs or source comments instead. The active GrapheneOS checkout may contain these files locally for building.
